programme.title: Powerful Shera-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera becomes very powerful after accidentally consuming the wrong drink. S07E05.

programme.title: Katrina Ka Replacement-Titoo
programme.desc: Katrina is fired, and a robot house help is hired in her place. S07E06.

programme.title: Bahadur Ki Bahaduri-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07E07.

programme.title: Golden Hair-Titoo
programme.desc: When his father gets concerned about his hair fall, Titoo comes up with a solution. S07 E01.

programme.title: World Animal Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito brings a donkey to school in order to challenge his teacher. S07E08.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cousin Neemku-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's assignment to speak kindly is put to the test when his blunt cousin arrives. S07E09.

programme.title: Purani Almari-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E10.

programme.title: Organic Holi-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends play Holi, but accidentally spray red colour on Mrs Chatterjee. S07E12.

programme.title: Jodi No 1-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo accidentally gets glue on his uniform and causes chaos at home. S07E13.

programme.title: Mummy Chor-Titoo
programme.desc: When their mother gets stolen, Titoo and his brother make a plan to get her back. S07E15.

programme.title: Classical Dance Teacher-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo finds himself in a comedic situation involving a classical dance instructor. S07E16.

programme.title: Dosti Mein Darar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E17.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: When the boys are late for school, Hunny confidently finds a solution. S01 E49.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Choocha manipulates Hunny and Laali into doing his bidding with a magical statement. S01 E50.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E73.
